title: ecbolium neuranthum
intro: Ecbolium neuranthum, also known as the blue spurry, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can be used to treat skin infections and other conditions. The health benefits of Ecbolium neuranthum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, it is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
